metadata.title: Flow Studio
metadata.description: Live online yoga classes for expats & digital nomads — build routine and healthy habits anywhere in the world.

hero.title:
Find Your Flow,
Anywhere in the World
hero.subtitle: Live online yoga for expats & digital nomads. Build routine, cultivate calm, and connect with a global community — wherever life takes you.

mission.title: Movement Is Medicine
mission.description: We believe that a consistent yoga practice is the foundation of a healthy, balanced life — especially when you're far from home. Flow Studio brings the warmth of a neighborhood studio to your screen, no matter which timezone you're in.

items.title: Live, Not Recorded
items.description: Every class is taught in real-time. Your teacher sees you, corrects you, and knows your name.

items.title: Timezone Flexible
items.description: Classes across UTC+0 to UTC+12. Morning flow in Bali, evening unwind in Berlin — we've got you.

items.title: Community First
items.description: A global tribe of movers. Monthly challenges, partner practices, and post-class hangouts.

items.title: All Levels Welcome
items.description: From your first downward dog to advanced inversions. Every body, every level, every day.

items.name: Vinyasa Flow
items.description: Dynamic, breath-linked movement that builds strength and flexibility. Expect creative sequencing and a satisfying sweat.

items.name: Slow Hatha
items.description: Grounding, mindful holds that deepen awareness and build a strong foundation. Perfect for beginners.

items.name: Yin & Restore
items.description: Deep, long-held stretches that release tension from fascia and calm the nervous system. Pure bliss.

items.name: Morning Meditation
items.description: Guided breathwork and meditation to start your day centered. No mat needed — just show up.

items.quote: Flow Studio made Lisbon feel like home. The morning classes became my anchor while everything else was new.
items.name: Sarah K.

items.quote: I've tried every online yoga platform. This is the only one where the teacher actually knows me. It's real.
items.name: Marco D.

items.quote: The yin classes are saving my back from 10 hours of laptop work. And the community? Like having friends everywhere.
items.name: Yuki T.

cta.title: Your Mat Is Waiting
cta.description: Join a global community of movers and start building the routine your body has been asking for.

about.title: About Flow Studio
about.description: We're a small team of yoga teachers and digital nomads who got tired of inconsistent practice on the road.

history.title: Our Story
history.content: Flow Studio was born from a simple need: consistent, high-quality yoga no matter where in the world you wake up. Founded by expat instructors who understand the nomadic lifestyle, we built the studio we wished existed — live classes, real connection, flexible scheduling.

programs.title: Our Classes
programs.description: From energizing morning flows to deep evening restoratives, find the practice that fits your day.

list.title: Vinyasa Flow
list.description: Dynamic movement synced with breath. Build heat, build strength, find your flow state.

list.title: Slow Hatha
list.description: Mindful alignment-focused practice. Hold, breathe, deepen — perfect for building foundations.

list.title: Yin & Restore
list.description: Long-held passive poses targeting deep connective tissue. The antidote to busy days.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Questions about classes, pricing, or partnerships? We'd love to hear from you.
